channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: 'Trump Called India A Hellhole,' Reporter Tells Marco Rubio. His Response

media:content.media:description: Rubio addressed concerns about racist remarks faced by Indians.

item.description: The exchange referred to an incident in April when US President Trump shared on social media a derogatory post by a podcaster that described India as a "hellhole".
item.content:encoded: The exchange referred to an incident in April when US President Trump shared on social media a derogatory post by a podcaster that described India as a "hellhole".

item.title: Explained: What Needs To Be Agreed To End Iran War?

media:content.media:description: The two sides have remained at odds on difficult issues including Iran's nuclear ambitions

item.description: Iran's foreign ministry spokesperson said on Monday that conclusions have been reached on many topics discussed in a potential 14-point memorandum of understanding, but this does not mean a deal to end the Middle East war is imminent.
item.content:encoded: Iran's foreign ministry spokesperson said on Monday that conclusions have been reached on many topics discussed in a potential 14-point memorandum of understanding, but this does not mean a deal to end the Middle East war is imminent.

item.title: 50,000 Evacuated As Toxic Chemical Tank Sparks "Catastrophic Explosion" Fear

media:content.media:description: A storage tank at the GKN Aerospace facility contains about 7,000 gallons of a chemical

item.description: A storage tank at the GKN Aerospace facility contains about 7,000 gallons of a chemical called methyl methacrylate.
item.content:encoded: A storage tank at the GKN Aerospace facility contains about 7,000 gallons of a chemical called methyl methacrylate.

item.title: Police Rescue Man Walking Into Freeway Traffic With Help Of Drone In US

media:content.media:description: Police said the drone pilot was able to quickly locate the man walking on the freeway.

item.description: The Dallas Police Department said the incident was one of the first positive outcomes from the Drone First Responder program.
item.content:encoded: The Dallas Police Department said the incident was one of the first positive outcomes from the Drone First Responder program.

item.title: Opinion: Opinion | All Roads Lead To China? Why Xi Hosted Trump And Putin Back-To-Back
item.description: Symbolism is essential. And in that domain, Beijing ensured that it dominated the global stage.
item.content:encoded: Symbolism is essential. And in that domain, Beijing ensured that it dominated the global stage.

item.title: Air India Express Plane To Kerala Hit Lights, Sustained Heavy Damage In Oman

media:content.media:description: The aircraft was operating a flight from Muscat to Kerala's Kannur.

item.description: While accelerating for takeoff, the aircraft collided with runway edge lights. Several lights were knocked out, and the nose gear was damaged.
item.content:encoded: While accelerating for takeoff, the aircraft collided with runway edge lights. Several lights were knocked out, and the nose gear was damaged.

item.title: Why Cruise Ships Are Taking Tourists To A Place That Doesn't Exist On Maps

media:content.media:description: Because of this repeated error, online users jokingly created the fictional "Null Island".

item.description: The spot has become popular online over the years because of GPS errors and mapping glitches.
item.content:encoded: The spot has become popular online over the years because of GPS errors and mapping glitches.

item.title: "Aabar Dekha Hobe": Indian Envoy's Farewell Note As Dhaka Stint Ends

media:content.media:description: He said the relationship is of significant interdependencies and interlinkages.

item.description: He added the cooperation between two countries is critical to address shared challenges like climate change and environmental sustainability.
item.content:encoded: He added the cooperation between two countries is critical to address shared challenges like climate change and environmental sustainability.

item.title: Gerald Eddie Brown: Once A US Air Force Pilot, Now Accused Of Helping China

media:content.media:description: Federal prosecutors claim Gerald Eddie Brown violated US arms-control laws.

item.description: Gerald Eddie Brown, 63, was arrested in February after returning to the US from China.
item.content:encoded: Gerald Eddie Brown, 63, was arrested in February after returning to the US from China.

item.title: The Curious Case Of An Award-Winning Story That Is Likely AI-Written

media:content.media:description: The irony that AI is used to detect AI-writing is not lost on anyone

item.description: A short story that won one of the English-speaking world's most recognised literary prizes is now at the centre of an uncomfortable AI debate.
item.content:encoded: A short story that won one of the English-speaking world's most recognised literary prizes is now at the centre of an uncomfortable AI debate.

item.title: Bangladesh Puts AI In Driving Seat To Tackle Dhaka's Traffic Chaos

media:content.media:description: For now, police are only fining the worst offenders -- while giving the others a warning.

item.description: Despite repeated attempts to modernise traffic management, the city of more than 22 million people had remained reliant on manual control, with officers stretching ropes across roads before traffic lights turned green.
item.content:encoded: Despite repeated attempts to modernise traffic management, the city of more than 22 million people had remained reliant on manual control, with officers stretching ropes across roads before traffic lights turned green.

item.title: US Iran War Live Updates: Iran, US Play Down Hopes For Imminent Breakthrough In War
item.description: US Iran War Live Updates: Iran's top negotiator Mohammad Baqer Qalibaf said Iran's armed forces had rebuilt their capabilities during the ceasefire.
item.content:encoded: US Iran War Live Updates: Iran's top negotiator Mohammad Baqer Qalibaf said Iran's armed forces had rebuilt their capabilities during the ceasefire.

item.title: Pak's Asim Munir, Shehbaz Sharif Turn To China Seeking US-Iran Breakthrough

media:content.media:description: Pakistan hosted in April the only direct negotiations between US and Iranian officials

item.description: China has played a quieter role, shepherding phone calls and meetings with officials of affected Gulf countries.
item.content:encoded: China has played a quieter role, shepherding phone calls and meetings with officials of affected Gulf countries.

item.title: Iran Used Dubai Route To Smuggle Chinese Military Tech: Report

media:content.media:description: The report claims the Chinese ship unloaded the container at Jebel Ali port in Dubai.

item.description: The company arranged the shipment of nearly 1.8 tonnes of Chinese-made satellite antenna equipment from Shanghai to Iran via Dubai in late 2025.
item.content:encoded: The company arranged the shipment of nearly 1.8 tonnes of Chinese-made satellite antenna equipment from Shanghai to Iran via Dubai in late 2025.

item.title: Opinion: Opinion | Why Are Some Of India's Sharpest Pakistan Critics Calling For 'Talks'?
item.description: In the past, almost every such initiative has been met with a return to a terror attack.
item.content:encoded: In the past, almost every such initiative has been met with a return to a terror attack.

item.title: 3 Dead, 17 Missing As Unfinished Hotel Collapses in Philippines

media:content.media:description: Twenty-six workers were either rescued or managed to run out of the collapsing building

item.description: A day after the unfinished building collapse with a loud crashing sound after a fierce thunderstorm, Angeles City Mayor Carmelo Lazatin said rescue efforts would still not be shifted to a body retrieval operation.
item.content:encoded: A day after the unfinished building collapse with a loud crashing sound after a fierce thunderstorm, Angeles City Mayor Carmelo Lazatin said rescue efforts would still not be shifted to a body retrieval operation.

item.title: Singha Beer Heir Sexual Abuse Allegations Ignite Rare Public Reckoning In Thailand

media:content.media:description: Siranudh has publicly distanced himself from his family's Boonrawd business empire

item.description: One of Thailand's biggest beer brands, Singha is recognised internationally for its golden lion logo and partnerships with sports giants Chelsea FC and the Haas Formula One team.
item.content:encoded: One of Thailand's biggest beer brands, Singha is recognised internationally for its golden lion logo and partnerships with sports giants Chelsea FC and the Haas Formula One team.

item.title: Pilgrims Kick Off Hajj As War's Trajectory Hangs In Balance

media:content.media:description: The white-robed pilgrims on buses or on foot arrived at the sprawling encampment in Mina

item.description: The start of the hajj came as US President Donald Trump continued to send mixed signals over a possible agreement to extend an uneasy ceasefire with Iran and a deal to reopen the Strait of Hormuz.
item.content:encoded: The start of the hajj came as US President Donald Trump continued to send mixed signals over a possible agreement to extend an uneasy ceasefire with Iran and a deal to reopen the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Indian Sailors Risk Work At Sea As Iran War Grinds On: 'It's Well Paid Job'

media:content.media:description: Desh Garima, an Indian-flagged tanker carrying crude oil that transited through the Strait of Hormuz

item.description: India is one of the largest contributors of sailors on merchant shipping worldwide, with more than 320,000 active seafarers in 2025, according to the shipping ministry.
item.content:encoded: India is one of the largest contributors of sailors on merchant shipping worldwide, with more than 320,000 active seafarers in 2025, according to the shipping ministry.

item.title: Mojtaba Khamenei In Hiding, Using Courier Network To Communicate: Report

media:content.media:description: The White House has declined to comment on intelligence related to the supreme leader's whereabouts

item.description: Khamenei, who was injured in US and Israeli strikes in Operation Epic Fury, has not been officially seen or heard in public since before the start of the war. Media reports claim he is taking extreme measures to avoid the strikes similar to the ones
item.content:encoded: Khamenei, who was injured in US and Israeli strikes in Operation Epic Fury, has not been officially seen or heard in public since before the start of the war. Media reports claim he is taking extreme measures to avoid the strikes similar to the ones
